_comment: Hum harvester registry. Copy to data/hum-interests.json (gitignored) and edit. Each topic is one harvester invocation; the harness reads this on every tick and runs every enabled topic whose cadence has elapsed.

_schema.name: Topic id. Matches the harvester filename: agent/scripts/hum-harvesters/<name>.mjs
_schema.enabled: true to run this topic on ticks
_schema.script: Override script path. Default is hum-harvesters/<name>.mjs.
_schema.cadence_min: Minimum minutes between runs (0 = run every tick)
_schema.cache_ttl_min: Per-topic harvester output cache TTL (the harvester reads its cache before doing network work)
_schema.active_window: When this topic should run. Examples: 'daily', 'mon-fri 09:30-16:00 ET', 'sat-sun', or null. If null/'daily', always runs.
_schema.urgency_rule: Optional inline override of the ranker's urgency weight. Defaults are fine to start.

topics.name: serendipity
topics._note: deferred — needs a richer places-scoring backend. Disabled by default.
